title: Success
overview: Money, fame and power. Dr. Peterson examines the markers of success and while these aren’t the worst markers they have their drawbacks and cautions. Jordan explains the ways success can look like between the sexes and what matters most to each. You aren’t alone and neither can you find a definition of success alone, you need to integrate into the community to find harmony leading to ultimate satisfaction.
